title: ETPlanet Hand Operated Flying Toy Drone for Kids, 360° Hands Free Motion Sensors Mini Drone with Cool LED Lights, Easy Indoor Small UFO Toy Flying Ball Drone for 6 7 8 9 10+ Year Old Boys and Girls
features: 【Hand Controlled High Tech Design (Gesture Induction)】Our UFO flying drone are equipped with 360° motion sensors that detect objects for ultimate flight control and obstacle avoidance. Place both hands on both sides of the drone, swipe a hand under when the lights start to blink rapidly, and watch this LED drone perform a 360° flip, get super cool and enjoy super fun. It’s designed to work indoors as well as outdoors, with a smooth flight pattern effect.

【Safe And Durable Webbed Shell Design】This flying toy drone is made of nontoxic and high-grade PP material, safe webbed shell that protects hands, walls, and furniture from the propellers. Woven shell design and protective case makes it easy to catch and keeps it from breaking. which is lightweight and flexible, making it able to withstand countless crashes.

【Indoor Hover Drone for Beginners】This indoor hover drone for beginners is equipped with powerful motors with equipped with smart, obstacle avoidance motion sensors, use your hand to guide to fly in all directions. The flying toys can light up, floats, moves, and 360 stunting through the air at your command (with gesture control). Then catch the UFO over and it will stop flying automatically.

【Cool LED Lights】When UFO drone is flying, there are 12 cool Colorful LED lights on the side, it can automatically change different LED light flashing modes according to the flight status. This cool drone not only brings fun to play but also helps to improve children's hands-on ability, operating skills, intelligence, and creativity. Enjoy vibrant LEDs light up this UFO flying toy with every flight.

【Portable USB Charging 】When the LED indicator flashes, it means that the drone needs to charged. The indicator light comes on when charging and goes off when fully charged. About 35-45 minutes full charge, 6-10 working duration. The hover drone toys enables various charging options such as charged by computer, power adapter, car charger, portable charger etc. Wherever you go, the drone ball for kids can easily carry, and will not take up a lot of space.
description: Product Description Hand Operated Drone for Kids, Hands Free Motion Sensor UFO Mini Drone ABS material, Non-toxic, lightweight and flexible, soft impact protection, safety for small children! 360°sensor tech, 360° motion sensors to detect objects for ultimate flight control and obstacle avoidance! Hands free motion sensor mini drone equipped with smart, obstacle avoidance motion sensors, use your hand to guide its flight! When a fixed object is detected, the flying toy can also move intelligently! The flying toy will rise when air pressure is detected when approaching the ground or object! Vibrant LED lamps make flying mini drone extra fun in the dark! Many kinds of power bank, laptop, such as car USB, multi-USB plug, charging options etc. The flying ball drone light shape can not direct the shot to protect the child's eye from damage. 360° SENSOR FLOATING TECHNOLOGY The flying ball drone has advanced LED infrared sensor floating technology, induction hover and anti-collision protection. The built-in gyroscope can control precision and sensitivity to achieve balance. Place your hands on both sides of this flying ball drone, when the lights start blinking rapidly, swipe a hand under it to see the LED flying ufo perform a 360° flip. SAFE FOR KIDS This flying saucer flight toy is made of high-grade ABS material, which is lightweight and flexible, making it able to withstand countless crashes. Easy operation, friendly for kids. The propellers are safely concealed within the ball drone. The enclosed propellers cause no worry that children will be hurt by their blades. VIBRANT COLORFUL LED LIHTS Our flying drone leaves green and blue LED light trails as it zooms across the room and projects a kaleidoscope of bright multicolor LED lights on ceilings and walls.The colorful LED strip is so cool, especially at night. Kid Friendly Mini Drone, Gift for 6 7 8 9 10+ Year Old Boys Girls Teens Indoor and Outdoor Toys TOSS TO LAUNCH: Easy operation, friendly for kids. To launch, simply toss this hands free drone in the air and it will hover mid air. If you do not operate within 1-2 seconds, the aircraft will descend to a certain altitude and hover again. DIRECT ITS FLIGHT: Place your hand on one side of the mini drone quad induction levitations UFO to push it to the other side. Make a gesture around the hand controlled drone and see it react to the obstacle and change direction. HOVER FLYING: Just turn it on and throw it into the air. lt stands up and starts to hover, showing off the cool colorful dynamic RGB lights. 360°TUMBLING STUNTS: Place your hands on both sides of this flying ball drone, when the lights start blinking rapidly, swipe a hand under it to see the flying ufo perform a 360° flip! TURN IT OVER TO STOP IT FLYING: If it falls down, grab it and turn it over to stop flying. Then long press and hold the on/off button until the middle indicator is off. Experience the Magic of Flight with Flying Drone Our hand-operated flying drone toy are suitable for kids (Over 6 years) and adults and are perfect for drone beginners. Perfect for a back & forth game of catch or team tricks with friends. It is designed to work indoors as well as outdoors with a smooth flight pattern. FUN FOR KIDS: Create your own multiplayer games with friends and before you know it, you’ll be flying these drones everywhere at home, the office, your dorm room, and beyond! Durable and Safe Webbed Shell Design All it takes is a gentle toss to get drone flying, no remote control needed. This mini flying drone changes directions based on the movement of your hand on the side or under the drone! Safe webbed shell design that protects hands, walls, and furniture from the propellers also keeps the drone safe from damages as it fly around any indoor space. Perfect Creative Gift for Kids and Friends This cool manual flying drone balls is a fun exquisite ideas novelty gift for Birthdays, Parties, Father's Day, Mother's Day, Halloween, Easter, New Year, Thanksgiving Day, Christmas. Besides, Enjoying the fun with your family friends at anytime by flying drone toy. The flying drone toy can help your children's Improve intelligence and creativity, It is a perfect way to reduce stress and interactive. It’s a perfect nice surprise gift for kids, teenagers, adults, and the elderly.
